title: CCTV Camera Offline and Unreachable Status Alerting
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-1h
| eval cam=coalesce(camera_id, device_id, "")
| eval state=coalesce(connection_state, reachability, "")
| where match(lower(state), "(?i)offline|unreachable|down|lost")
| stats latest(state) as state latest(_time) as seen by cam site
description: Cameras drop from PoE, cable faults, or IP conflicts; diagnostic streams give faster mean time to restore than hallway rounds.
value: Closes coverage blind spots for retail, labs, and perimeter lines.
implementation: (1) Poll NVR or VMS API. (2) Deduplicate flapping links. (3) Integrate with access control for maintenance badges.
grandmaExplanation: We alert when cameras go dark so blind spots are fixed quickly.
